description: A data entry clerk accidentally deleted (voided) a vital signs record for patient 'Sarah Johnson' (Identifier: BAH000003). The data is valid and needs to be restored. Log in to the OpenMRS Administration interface (https://localhost/openmrs/admin) with username 'superman' and password 'Admin123'. Locate and restore the voided 'Vitals' encounter for Sarah Johnson created today so that it is active and visible in standard patient dashboards.
